headline: SpaceX’s IPO Filing Could Be Confidential. What That Means—and Why It Matters.
summary: SpaceX’s expected IPO could rely on a confidential filing process created for smaller companies, giving Elon Musk’s firm more flexibility as it prepares what could be a record-breaking offering.

raw.headline: SpaceX’s IPO Filing Could Be Confidential. What That Means—and Why It Matters.

headline: Aerospace Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking TransDigm (NYSE:TDG)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at aerospace stocks, starting with TransDigm (NYSE:TDG).
